tour.title: Application Shell
tour.description: Start at the React app shell to see how UI, engine, rules, and loaded script packs meet.

tour.title: Manifest and Loader
tour.description: The script manifest names the pack, and the loader imports the body data only when needed.

tour.title: Editable Script Body
tour.description: Special event stages are represented as editable graph nodes tied back to source spans.
